notes: Captured Shopify Admin API 2026-04 orderUpdate input validation for an empty mutable payload, malformed phone, malformed shipping address, and a happy-path note update on the same disposable order. Shopify's 2026-04 orderUpdate userErrors selection exposes field/message but not code, so code parity remains covered by runtime tests while this executable parity spec proves the live field/message contract and downstream read-after-write contrast.

expectedDifferences.reason: Shopify returns the live order update timestamp on the downstream read; the proxy uses its deterministic staged-order timestamp while preserving timestamp shape.
